what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment, linking a channel-memory attachment id to an image asset target in the design-source channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
File body is empty after the frontmatter
standouts: Target references a specific pitch asset at 'recent-pitches/p-38'
Attachment is typed as 'images' in the 'design-source' channel
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Id prefix 'att-' indicates an attachment record
Uses a custom 'image://' URI scheme to locate the asset
Empty body keeps the file as pure metadata
concerns: Target URI provides no file extension, dimensions, or format hints
No uploader, author, or provenance field beyond the timestamp
No alt text, caption, or content hash for the image
No explicit link to a specific message or pitch revision
notes: This is a lightweight metadata stub that points an attachment record to an image asset associated with a recent design pitch.
questions: What image format and resolution does 'image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-38' resolve to?
Who added this attachment and in what context?
Is 'p-38' a pitch id, and which revision of the pitch does it belong to?
Does the target URI require a separate asset store or filesystem mapping?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches its content: it stores a typed, timestamped link to an image asset.
apparent_themes: Separation of media assets from their metadata records
intention_signals: It appears designed to catalog an image asset attached to a design-source pitch so the attachment can be retrieved, referenced, and audited independently of the image file itself.
novelty: The use of a custom 'image://' URI scheme to reference a channel-local image asset is a notable design choice.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed attachment record that maps a stable attachment id to an image asset target, supporting asset provenance and retrieval within the channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that links attachment id 'att-db89e35a' to the image asset 'image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-38' with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record and reference an image attachment associated with a design-source pitch.
